name: Cross-box (front), connecting frame columns 4 and 10
notes: Flat development of the cross-box that pinches together the front and back center columns (pieces 4 and 10). Internal labels per Panel D are: g, h, e, f, c, d, b, b₃₀, a, c₃₀. Tabs a–h are split between piece 4 (a–d) and piece 10 (e–h) here; that split is an assumption from the ambiguous Panel D phrasing and should be confirmed during the Inkscape hand-edit pass (M1 task 1.5). The flange-fold count (4) is also an assumption from the 'on all flanges' note — actual count is whatever the auto-trace surfaces. Per §II.A and Fig. 4, pieces 31 and 32 are inserted (back-to-back, without glue) into the slot between pieces 29 and 30.
